target_problem: de-novo molecule generation conditioned on protein binding pocket
retrieval_mechanism: top-k similar molecules retrieved from ChEMBL via ECFP4 fingerprint, fed as exemplars to the diffusion decoder
three_claims: +18% binding affinity gain over baseline diffusion (vina docking score)
60% data-efficient: matches baseline final loss in 60% of training steps
scaling law R^2 > 0.9 confirmed on 5 model sizes
headline_finding: RetroDiff doubles hit rate over baseline diffusion at fixed compute.
venue: Cell-tier (Cell Reports / Nat Commun / Sci Adv)
